creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
I request disable opencv support (until maintainer fix it) , it's solve ffmpeg crash on i386:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=199715
Also fix mpv crash:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=198758
Possible crash with old x86_64 processors without SSE3 support:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=200234
and possible crash with powerpc64:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=198133
